title: User Login
description: Users should be able to log in with email and password.
user_story: As a registered user, I want to login so I can access my account.
acceptance_criteria: Valid email and password logs user in

title: User Registration
description: New users can create an account with email verification.
user_story: As a visitor, I want to register so I can become a member.

title: Password Reset
description: Users can reset their password using a verified email link.
user_story: As a user, I want to reset my password if I forget it so I can regain access.
acceptance_criteria: Reset link sent only to registered email
New password must follow password policy

title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
description: Support optional SMS-based two-factor authentication at login.
user_story: As a security-conscious user, I want 2FA so attackers cannot access my account with password only.
acceptance_criteria: When enabled, login requires OTP sent via SMS

title: Search Products
description: Users can search products by keyword, category, and apply filters.
user_story: As a shopper, I want to search products so I can find items to buy.
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results within 2 seconds

title: Add to Cart
description: Users can add products to a shopping cart and view cart summary.
user_story: As a shopper, I want to add items to my cart so I can check out later.
acceptance_criteria: Cart total calculates price + tax + shipping
Cart persists for logged-in users across sessions

test_cases.title: Add single item to empty cart

title: Checkout and Payment
description: Users can checkout and pay via credit card or PayPal.
user_story: As a purchaser, I want to pay securely so I can complete orders.
acceptance_criteria: Payment failures show clear error messages

title: Order Tracking
description: Users can track order status from processing to delivered.
user_story: As a customer, I want to track my order so I know when it will arrive.
acceptance_criteria: Order status updates are reflected in UI
Tracking number links to carrier page

title: User Profile Update
description: Users can update personal details and upload profile picture.
user_story: As a user, I want to update my profile so information stays current.
acceptance_criteria: Image upload accepts jpeg/png and limits size to 2MB

title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
description: Support admin and regular user roles with different permissions.
user_story: As an admin, I want to manage users and content so I can keep the platform safe.
acceptance_criteria: Regular users cannot access admin routes (403)

title: Bulk CSV Upload for Products
description: Admin can upload products via CSV with validation and error reporting.
user_story: As an admin, I want to upload many products at once so I save time.
acceptance_criteria: Upload handles 10k rows without server crash

title: Email Notifications
description: System sends transactional emails on registration, order, and password reset.
user_story: As a user, I want to receive confirmations so I know actions completed.
acceptance_criteria: Emails are queued and sent within 2 minutes
Templates render correctly with user data

title: Wishlist
description: Users can add and remove products from a wishlist.
user_story: As a shopper, I want to save products for later so I can buy when ready.
acceptance_criteria: Adding a product already in wishlist shows a message
Removing a product updates wishlist count

title: Localization Support
description: Application supports English and Spanish content with language switcher.
user_story: As a Spanish speaker, I want to view the UI in Spanish so I can use the app comfortably.
acceptance_criteria: All visible strings change when language toggled

title: Accessibility - Keyboard Navigation
description: All interactive elements must be reachable by keyboard and have ARIA labels.
user_story: As a keyboard user, I want to navigate without a mouse so the site is accessible.
acceptance_criteria: Buttons and links have accessible names
Forms announce validation errors via ARIA

title: Product Reviews
description: Customers can submit and view product reviews with ratings.
user_story: As a buyer, I want to read reviews so I can make informed purchases.

title: Autosave Drafts for Forms
description: Long forms automatically save user input every 30 seconds.
user_story: As a user, I want my progress saved automatically so I don't lose data.
acceptance_criteria: Drafts are restorable on page reload

title: API Rate Limiting
description: Public APIs are rate-limited to 100 requests per minute per IP.
user_story: As an API consumer, I want predictable rate limits so my client behaves correctly.

title: Export Order History
description: Users can export their order history as CSV within a selected date range.
user_story: As a user, I want to download my orders so I can keep personal records.
acceptance_criteria: CSV contains order id, date, total, items
Export file downloads within 10 seconds for 1 year data

title: Real-time Chat Support
description: Provide real-time chat between user and support agents with presence indicators.
user_story: As a user, I want to chat with support so I can resolve issues quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Offline messages stored and delivered when agent returns

title: Subscription Billing
description: Users can subscribe to monthly plans with automatic billing.
user_story: As a subscriber, I want recurring billing so my subscription remains active.
acceptance_criteria: Failed payments notify user and retry per policy

title: Refund Request
description: Customers can request a refund within 30 days of delivery.
user_story: As a customer, I want to request refunds for returned items so I can be reimbursed.
acceptance_criteria: Refund requests validate order date and status
Status changes are logged and emailed
Partial refunds allowed if part of order returned

title: Admin Dashboard Analytics
description: Admin dashboard shows daily active users and revenue charts.
user_story: As an admin, I want analytics so I can monitor platform health.
acceptance_criteria: Charts display data for selected range

title: Profile Privacy Settings
description: Users can set their profile visibility (public/private/friends-only).
user_story: As a user, I want control over who sees my profile to protect privacy.
acceptance_criteria: Private profiles are not visible to anonymous users

title: Notification Preferences
description: Users can opt in/out of email and SMS notifications separately.
user_story: As a user, I want to control notification channels so I receive only what I want.
acceptance_criteria: Opt-out stops further messages to that channel
Defaults are opt-in for essential messages only

title: Image Upload and Resize
description: Users can upload images which are validated and resized to multiple sizes.
user_story: As a user, I want images to upload quickly and be displayed correctly.
acceptance_criteria: Images are resized to thumbnail, medium, and large
Upload fails gracefully on network error

title: Comment Moderation
description: Comments by users are moderated for profanity and spam before publishing.
user_story: As a community manager, I want moderation so the site remains civil.
acceptance_criteria: Spam heuristics catch common spam patterns

title: Data Export API
description: Provide an authenticated API to export user data in JSON for portability.
user_story: As a user, I want to export my data to move it elsewhere.

title: Search Autocomplete
description: Autocomplete suggestions appear as user types in the search box.
user_story: As a user, I want suggestions so I can complete my query faster.
acceptance_criteria: Keyboard navigation works within suggestions list

title: Scheduled Reports
description: Admins can schedule daily/weekly reports to be emailed automatically.
user_story: As an admin, I want automatic reports so I don't export data manually.
